# Invoice Lifecycle API

**Layer:** Domain | **Pattern:** State Machine / Domain Service
**BIAN:** AccountsReceivable (semantic_alignment)
**Generated by:** GitHub Copilot – Claude Sonnet 4.6

## Purpose

Pure domain service that owns the invoice state machine. Validates transitions, rejects invalid ones, and maintains an immutable audit trail. No external dependencies.

## State Machine

```
PENDING ──► APPROVED ──► SCHEDULED ──► PAID
   │            │              │
   ▼            ▼              ▼
REJECTED    CANCELLED      CANCELLED
```

| From | Allowed To |
|------|-----------|
| PENDING | APPROVED, REJECTED, CANCELLED |
| APPROVED | SCHEDULED, CANCELLED |
| SCHEDULED | PAID, CANCELLED |
| REJECTED | (terminal) |
| PAID | (terminal) |
| CANCELLED | (terminal) |

## Endpoints

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| POST | /invoice-lifecycle/{id}/transition | Execute state transition |
| GET | /invoice-lifecycle/{id}/history | Immutable history |
| GET | /invoice-lifecycle/{id}/current-state | Current state |

## Data Ownership

Three append-only PostgreSQL tables: `invoice_lifecycle`, `state_transitions`, `audit_log`.
